feat.name: Desperate Wish
feat.text: You call out a desperate wish to the stars to save a friend. You gain *breath of life* as an innate arcane spell, which you can cast once per day only while in sentinel form. Interceding in such a direct way temporarily exhausts your constellation’s magic, causing you to revert from your sentinel form once the spell is cast.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
